---
title: Fenia Dieckmann
description: Department of Ophthalmology, University of Bonn
categories: "M. Pfau"
image: Dieckmann_Fenia.webp
about:
  template: trestles
---

Fenia Dieckmann is a medical student and doctoral candidate (Dr. med.) at the University of Bonn, investigating factors that affect the reliability and clinical interpretation of photoreceptor-specific perimetry under light- and dark-adapted conditions.
